title: iverilog hangs forever for certain bit of Verilog code

features.name: large unpacked memory array with 2^16 elements
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked array memory of 2^16 (65536) elements where SIZE is a localparam calculated as 1 << SZ_LOG2 with SZ_LOG2=16

features.name: delayed wire assignment with #1 delay
features.description: Code should include wire assignments with explicit delay (#1) driving signals used in multiple always blocks
features.snippet:
assign #1 addr_int = addr;
assign #1 din_int  = din;

features.name: combinational always block with inequality comparisons
features.description: Code should include an always @* block with multiple inequality comparisons (!==) and logical OR that accesses a large unpacked array

features.name: signals driven by different always blocks with cross-references
features.description: Code should include signals where addr_sampled and din_sampled are assigned in an always @(posedge ce) block but compared in an always @* block
